scripts.dev: pnpm -C packages/shared build && pnpm -C packages/runtime build && concurrently -n shared,runtime,server,web -c auto "pnpm -C packages/shared dev" "pnpm -C packages/runtime dev" "pnpm -C apps/server dev" "pnpm -C apps/web dev"
scripts.lint: pnpm -C packages/shared build && pnpm -C packages/runtime build && pnpm -r lint
scripts.test: pnpm -C packages/shared build && pnpm -C packages/runtime build && pnpm -r test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -C packages/shared build && pnpm -C packages/runtime build && pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm -C packages/shared build && pnpm -C packages/runtime build && pnpm -r lint && pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm -r test
